description: You are a Structural BIM Modeler detailing a steel portal frame for an industrial warehouse. Using the conceptual layout in /home/ga/BIMProjects/warehouse_baseline.ifc, upgrade the model to LOD 300 by adding standardized structural steel members. Create a 'Steel' material and an IFC Material Profile Set using an IfcIShapeProfileDef (e.g., 300mm depth, 150mm flange). Model at least 4 IfcColumn or IfcBeam elements representing the primary steel frame, ensuring their 3D geometry is parametrically driven by the I-shape profile set rather than generic bounding boxes. Save the detailed structural model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/steel_portal_frame.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=70. Needs file_new(15) + profile_def(25) + profile_set(15) + at least 2 members(25) = 80 to pass.
